textByHashes.24dd0b084059220ff8bb317a93bcd0b4b3110b39: I think so. That navigator, Ithoi, always warned us that this kind of thing could happen, but I didn't think it could possibly be real. But now this has happened, and I think it's my fault.
textByHashes.4112d7defe93a584a5eaef2eddf82c048a15cb00: You should maybe see what Ithoi thinks. He's been cursed too, so I guess he'll be in his hut, off to the south-west, near the shore.
textByHashes.4fd90215847abdee00e993f4be7e29799a31bae9: A sympathetic soul you are. I'm in real pain here.
textByHashes.248147e8b51c3c61f9b34739a430d183eeb9eee4: I think so. That navigator, Ithoi, always warned us that this kind of thing could happen.
textByHashes.42e10b81b4478984c6e4f997835267263d14eee2: I'm afraid it may be all my fault.
textByHashes.3c421d587fd6b1d8036c6266dc146e66f64015e2: Captain Tock had me exploring some caves, west of the cove. I'm a thief, see, like my brother Francois, and the Captain thought I could sneak past the monsters without being noticed.
textByHashes.32fb9abff6848b7bcd71ab457f7672f62d6f91b9: Well, I climbed down the vines, and found a big cave filled with terrifying ogres!
textByHashes.4663c5d8a537654dcafdc4d3831615c01ea80b3d: I'd hoped I could use my amazing Thieving skills to avoid them seeing me, but I was out of luck. By the time I'd finished clambering down the ladder, they'd spotted me.
textByHashes.3d6304f0035fcb1e874090c686f0bc3d568017d1: Yes. I quickly grabbed some loot, so I wouldn't have to face the Captain empty-handed, and fled up the ladder before the ogres could kill me!
textByHashes.5b85770f010a9adaea90590f4a16b06751d91c44: But a couple of days later we all fell ill. I think what I stole must have been some kind of sacred relic, and the shamans in the cave have cursed us for stealing it.
textByHashes.08b51729a04ad49be855960006df44615489d262: Maybe you could get the relic back from the Captain, and return it to the ogres? And tell them I'm very sorry. Then perhaps they'll lift the curse.
textByHashes.f97cafa475a272eb8afedd36dcb3fadb4ba016a5: Have you got that relic back from Captain Tock? Maybe if you return it to the ogres, they'll lift the curse.
textByHashes.a27cbc50f91c4a8b71335bb349cf13950cafbcba: Please take it back to the ogres for me, and tell them I'm sorry.
textByHashes.3f00df887f7f2087e47d7f5f37a29ef990afa264: Have you returned the sacred relic to the ogres? Will they forgive me and lift the curse?
textByHashes.d40138629d5c79016c0cf97cea70c8236840751e: Are you telling me the ogres cursed us all because I stole their chief's tooth-pick?
textByHashes.5700f1c53a0e7fbc1edfac5be0a431e34980314e: Oh. That's a relief, I guess. Um... thank you for your help. But I do wonder where the curse really came from.
textByHashes.a846a852c7bc48e485e75b73d778ea144f43ba35: Do you know how we all got cursed?
textByHashes.51abcae86b6e67bc129ba0b2a1a2e36a96e183a0: I suppose Ithoi's trying to be extra helpful at the moment. Don't tell anyone, but Ithoi might not be in our crew much longer.
textByHashes.37efbae20746405e4ed9793af28e0f8fa7d9787a: My brother, Francois, says the Captain will make him second-in-command if he completes his mission. That's Ithoi's rank, but we don't need a navigator now we've settled here, and he can't do much else.
textByHashes.b25fd228f1ed093439cfda5ed464bf44e316190c: He's had a lot to worry about, with losing his place on the crew, and now he's sick from the curse too. He must have gone mad and started babbling.
textByHashes.d44fa722b706be2e244bfb033aef68132111f61b: I really didn't think he was like that. Still, if there isn't really a curse, I suppose we'll just get better from whatever he did to us. I don't feel so bad now.
textByHashes.0fb9628ce45a4c12915a38eb5f4ec45666333cc6: Thanks again for clearing up that 'curse'. Ever since you proved it wasn't supernatural, I've been feeling a lot better.
